title: ItemSwapper Create 6.0 Pack
description: Get all items and blocks from the create mod in easy to use palettes for the ItemSwapper Mod!
body:
85ish% done - Just need to fine tune which paletes appear for duplicate blocks across palettes

***

Use the Create Mod in the ItemSwapper Mod's UI! Start from any held item or find all of the create items/blocks right from the main ItemSwapper page.

THE CREATE MOD VERSION 6.0 IS REQUIRED

 

More itemswapper packs are planned for various mods and addons. I plan to make them all compatable and will be improving them as I make them.
